---
title: "Home"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-text}
# Elena Ballante

**Assistant Professor in Statistics**  
Department of Political and Social Sciences  
University of Pavia

I am a statistician working on machine learning and statistical learning methods for biomedical, health-related and social-science data. My research combines methodological development and applied data science, with interests in non-parametric and ensemble models, survival analysis, clustering, neuroimaging and statistical models for social sciences.


::: {.social-links}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=it&user=ylN4I_AAAAAJ) · [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3217-8930) · [GitHub](https://github.com/eballante) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/elena-ballante-1b3bb8102/)
:::
:::

::: {.hero-photo}
![](img/profile.png){fig-alt="Profile photo of Elena Ballante" .profile-photo}
:::
:::

## Research at a glance

::: {.cards}
::: {.card-custom}
### Statistical Learning
Development and application of statistical learning methods, with attention to interpretability, robustness and real-world data constraints.
:::

::: {.card-custom}
### Biomedical Data Science
Machine learning and data mining for biomedical data, neuroimaging, neurosciences and health-related applications.
:::

::: {.card-custom}
### Social and Health Data
Statistical and computational models for social sciences, education, socio-economic topics and health data.
:::
:::

## Current courses

- [Data Driven Approach for Social Sciences](courses/data-driven-social-sciences.qmd)
- [Methodological and Computational Approaches in Data Science](courses/methodological-computational-data-science.qmd)
